mapper.sql: id, provider_type, owner_type, owner_user_id, name, base_url, api_key_plaintext, credential_storage_type, credential_version, masked_key_suffix, provider_options_json::text as provider_options_json, max_concurrency, status, config_version, last_connection_test_status, last_connection_test_at, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into model_connections(provider_type, owner_type, owner_user_id, name, base_url, api_key_plaintext, credential_storage_type, credential_version, masked_key_suffix, provider_options_json, max_concurrency, status, config_version, last_connection_test_status, last_connection_test_at, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at) values(#{providerType}, #{ownerType}, #{ownerUserId}, #{name}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKeyPlaintext,typeHandler=com.dong.ddrag.modelplatform.security.EncryptedApiKeyTypeHandler}, #{credentialStorageType}, #{credentialVersion}, #{maskedKeySuffix}, cast(#{providerOptionsJson} as jsonb), #{maxConcurrency}, #{status}, #{configVersion}, #{lastConnectionTestStatus}, #{lastConnectionTestAt}, #{deletedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select from model_connections where id=#{connectionId} and owner_type=#{ownerType} and status<>'DELETED' and owner_user_id=#{ownerUserId}and owner_user_id is null
select from model_connections where id=#{connectionId} and status='ACTIVE' and deleted_at is null
select from model_connections where id=#{connectionId} and owner_type='PLATFORM' and status<>'DELETED' and deleted_at is null for update
select from model_connections where owner_type=#{ownerType} and status=#{status} and deleted_at is null and owner_user_id=#{ownerUserId}and owner_user_id is null order by id
select from model_connections where owner_type=#{ownerType} and status<>'DELETED' and owner_user_id=#{ownerUserId}and owner_user_id is null order by id
mapper.update:
update model_connections set provider_type=#{entity.providerType}, name=#{entity.name}, base_url=#{entity.baseUrl},
api_key_plaintext=#{entity.apiKeyPlaintext,typeHandler=com.dong.ddrag.modelplatform.security.EncryptedApiKeyTypeHandler}, masked_key_suffix=#{entity.maskedKeySuffix}, credential_storage_type=#{entity.credentialStorageType}, credential_version=#{entity.credentialVersion},
provider_options_json=cast(#{entity.providerOptionsJson} as jsonb), max_concurrency=#{entity.maxConcurrency}, config_version=#{entity.configVersion}, status=#{entity.status}, last_connection_test_status=#{entity.lastConnectionTestStatus}, last_connection_test_at=null, updated_at=#{entity.updatedAt} where id=#{entity.id} and owner_type=#{entity.ownerType} and config_version=#{expectedConfigVersion} and status=#{expectedStatus} and deleted_at is null and owner_user_id=#{entity.ownerUserId}and owner_user_id is null

update model_connections set api_key_plaintext=null, status='DELETED', deleted_at=#{deletedAt}, updated_at=#{deletedAt} where id=#{connectionId} and owner_type=#{ownerType} and status<>'DELETED' and owner_user_id=#{ownerUserId}and owner_user_id is null
